ABOUT US
Our Story
Since 1996, we’ve held the belief that our clients’ interests should always come first. We are a national firm that offers a personable and sophisticated approach that’s completely centered on your goals. Our commitment to evidence-based ideas and excellent client service is foundational to everything we do. We use the latest academic research and modern technology to create better outcomes for families we partner with.
Do What’s Right
We have a fiduciary duty to always to what’s right for our clients.
Exceptional Service
Our focus is providing you a high level of service helping you reach your goals
Evidence Based Decisions
Our commitment to evidence-based ideas is foundational to everything we do.
PWL: 30 Years in the Making
2026
PWL Capital’s celebrate its 30th Anniversary
1996
Founded by James Parkyn, Laurent Wermenlinger and Anthony Layton: Fee-based, No in-house products, No commissions, Integration of Investment Management and Financial Planning
1997
Ottawa office opens, Cameron Passmore joins PWL in Ottawa
2000
PWL adopts ETFs
2001
PWL updates brand identity (The Star Man)
2003
DFA mutual funds launched in Canada – PWL makes lead order of $100 Million
2008
PWL updates brand identity (The Pyramid)
PWL Capital helps guide clients through the Global Financial Crisis
2010
Our Montreal office has expanded and moved to Alexis Nihon, in downtown Montreal
2014
PWL updates brand identity-new brand positioning: PWL. Long Live Your Money
PWL reached $1 Billion AUM
2016
PWL Capital’s celebrate its 20th Anniversary
2017
PWL reached $2 Billion AUM
2018
Cameron Passmore and Ben Felix started the Rational Reminder Podcast
2019
PWL reached $3 Billion AUM
2020
PWL reached $5.6 Billion AUM
PWL Capital adapts and shows resilience during WFM COVID-19 pandemic
2021
Tony Layton retires, Cameron Passmore becomes majority owner and Chairman of the Board
2022
PWL Capital Launched Rebrand logo (Partnership, dialogue)
2025
PWL partners with OneDigital
PWL Acquires TCM Financial and EB Wealth

Meet Our Team
Meet the team that is making an impact for Canadian investors. We’re here to help guide you with expert advice and dedicated service. Our mission is simple: to turn your financial goals into reality, with personalized strategies that fit your life.
MEET OUR TEAM
BECOME A CLIENT
Helping Canadians simplify their wealth.
We offer holistic, full-service Wealth Management expertise to Canadians and their families. Our team will help you cut through all the busy noise and find your financial goals that really matter. Reach out to us to today to find out how we help make wealth simple.
30+
Years Serving Canadians
2700+
Client Families
100+
Employees Ready to Serve You
Our Investment Philosophy
Our investment philosophy is grounded in decades of empirical evidence. We take a less subjective, more systematic approach to investing in order to deliver the best service to our clients.
Don’t try to outguess the market
Resist chasing past performance
Let the markets work for you
Practice smart diversification
How do you determine the value you are getting?
The rise of evidence-based investing confirms the central role that great financial advice plays in providing value over the long-term, particularly when the seas get a bit choppy. Sound financial planning is the direct result of the trust and relationship established between you and your advisor. We are proud of the value we deliver each and every day. We are looking after the financial wellbeing of discerning Canadian investors like you, by:
Helping you plan every aspect of your financial life;
Providing long-term and historical perspective on the markets;
Delivering behavioural coaching in order to help you make the best decisions.
Keeping Your Assets Safe
PWL Capital is structured such that all your assets are held in accounts in your name by our carrying broker, National Bank Independent Network. PWL Capital and our Investment Advisors are registered and regulated by the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO). By virtue of our registration with the CIRO, we are also subject to the oversight of the provincial regulatory bodies (e.g.: Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF) in Quebec or the Ontario Securities Commission (OSC) in Ontario.)
LEARN MORE
Career Opportunities
Unlock your potential with a rewarding career in wealth management. Click here to explore exciting opportunities and start your journey at PWL Capital.
LEARN MORE
`
Portfolio Management and brokerage services are offered by PWL Capital Inc. which is regulated by the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO), and is a member of the Canadian Investor Protection Fund (CIPF).
Financial planning and insurance products are offered by PWL Advisors Inc. and are regulated in Ontario by Financial Services Regulatory Authority of Ontario (FSRA) and in Quebec by the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF). PWL Advisors Inc. is not a member of CIPF.
